description: Portable static monitoring policy for template and workflow metrics. Repos can tune thresholds without changing monitoring helper code.

checks.title: Template metadata coverage
checks.message: Template metadata coverage must remain complete.

checks.title: Template metadata drift
checks.message: Template metadata drift findings require correction.

checks.title: Template drift findings
checks.message: Template drift reports should stay clean.

checks.title: Active work-tracking folders
checks.message: More than one active work-tracking folder should be reviewed.

checks.title: Taskmaster in-progress count
checks.message: More than one in-progress Taskmaster task should be reviewed.

checks.title: Plan sync activity
checks.message: Plan sync should have at least one recorded entry.
